name: Cassian Andor
text:
Add 1 Cassian Andor miniature.
Leader.
This unit increases its [courage] by 1 and gains 1 [training] upgrade icon.
When 1 or more miniatures in this unit are defeated, you may flip this card. This card starts the game with this side faceup.
This unit has Low Profile and Secret Mission.

back.name: Cassian Andor
back.text:
This card starts the game with the other side faceup.
[rebel] [commander] Unit Only.
Add 1 Cassian Andor miniature.
Leader.
This unit changes its [courage] to "-".
This unit has Uncanny Luck 1.
Once per Turn, when this unit forms an Attack Pool, add 1 white attack die to the Attack Pool for each miniature from this unit that was previously defeated.
